units.source_text: 截⾄2025年12⽉31⽇⽌期間的業績包括因股權被攤薄導致的11億美元虧損，以及集團於交通銀⾏的權益賬⾯值減損10億美元。
units.translation_target_text: Results for the period ended December 31, 2025 include a loss of US$1.1 billion due to equity dilution and an impairment of the carrying value of the group's interest in Bank of Communications of US$1 billion.
units.translation_en: Results for the period ended December 31, 2025 include a loss of US$1.1 billion due to equity dilution and an impairment of the carrying value of the group's interest in Bank of Communications of US$1 billion.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: Results for the period ended December 31, 2025 include a loss of US$1.1 billion due to equity dilution and an impairment of the carrying value of the group's interest in Bank of Communications of US$1 billion.

units.source_text: 交通銀⾏於2025年6⽉17⽇完成發⾏資本後，集團持有的交通銀⾏股份由19.03%降⾄16%。集團的權益被攤薄，導致錄得稅前虧損11億美元，計
units.translation_target_text: After Bank of Communications completes the issuance of capital on June 17, 2025, the Group's shareholding in Bank of Communications will be reduced from 19.03% to 16%. The group’s equity was diluted, resulting in a pre-tax loss of US$1.1 billion, calculated
units.translation_en: After Bank of Communications completes the issuance of capital on June 17, 2025, the Group's shareholding in Bank of Communications will be reduced from 19.03% to 16%. The group’s equity was diluted, resulting in a pre-tax loss of US$1.1 billion, calculated

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: After Bank of Communications completes the issuance of capital on June 17, 2025, the Group's shareholding in Bank of Communications will be reduced from 19.03% to 16%. The group’s equity was diluted, resulting in a pre-tax loss of US$1.1 billion, calculated

units.source_text: 入集團綜合收益表的「其他營業收益／（⽀出）」項下。由於集團持有交通銀⾏股份乃作⻑線投資⽬的，因此有關虧損不可扣減稅款。
units.translation_target_text: It is included under "Other operating income/(expense)" in the Group's statement of comprehensive income. Since the Group holds Bank of Communications shares for online investment purposes, the relevant losses are not tax deductible.
units.translation_en: It is included under "Other operating income/(expense)" in the Group's statement of comprehensive income. Since the Group holds Bank of Communications shares for online investment purposes, the relevant losses are not tax deductible.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: It is included under "Other operating income/(expense)" in the Group's statement of comprehensive income. Since the Group holds Bank of Communications shares for online investment purposes, the relevant losses are not tax deductible.

units.source_text: 此外，集團對截⾄2025年6⽉30⽇的賬⾯值進⾏減值測試，結果顯⽰採⽤使⽤價值計算法所得的可收回⾦額低於賬⾯值，因此確認10億美元減值。
units.translation_target_text: In addition, the group conducted an impairment test on the book value as of June 30, 2025. The results showed that the recoverable amount obtained using the value-in-use calculation method was lower than the book value, so an impairment of US$1 billion was confirmed.
units.translation_en: In addition, the group conducted an impairment test on the book value as of June 30, 2025. The results showed that the recoverable amount obtained using the value-in-use calculation method was lower than the book value, so an impairment of US$1 billion was confirmed.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence
